pr.title: Fix IndexOutOfRangeException in AreaCV 2D histogram heat map (issue #4209)
pr.body:
## Summary
- Fixed IndexOutOfRangeException when AreaCV histogram max frequency equals 1
- Guarded heat map scale calculations against degenerate Math.Log(1) = 0 condition
- Added array bounds clamping to prevent negative indices from NaN conversions
- Created regression test to verify fix and prevent future occurrences

## Root Cause
When the maximum histogram bin frequency was exactly 1, `Math.Log(1) = 0` caused `fullScale = +Infinity`. In discrete legend mode, the color remapping calculation `0 * +Infinity = NaN`, and `(int)NaN` produces `int.MinValue` on .NET Framework, leading to array bounds violation in `_heatMapColors[colorIndex]`.

## Test Plan
- [x] Added regression test `TestHeatMapCrashRegression` integrated into existing `TestAreaCVHistograms`
- [x] Verified existing `TestAreaCVHistograms` functionality unchanged
- [x] Verified related `ClusteredHeatMapTest` functionality unchanged
- [x] All tests pass with the fix applied

See ai/todos/active/TODO-20260514_areacv_heatmap_index.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
pr.author: bspratt
